description: Monday.com is a visual project management tool for teams that is flexible. Everyone is on the same page thanks to easy access.
author: Deep K.
pros: The boards and colored states on monday com make keeping track of projects fun. I like how methods and project updates can be changed as needed.
cons: When there are more users, prices can go up and complex services become hard to understand.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: My experience has been very good. Monday service helps me stay organized, work faster, and keep track of everything. It makes my job easier, and I use it every day.
author: Marbelin A.
pros: I like that it helps me, and my team stay organized. It’s easy to see all our tasks in one place. I can also set reminders, track progress, and everything is clear and simple to use.
cons: Sometimes it takes a little time to learn how to use all the features. It can feel a bit confusing at first.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: OK Service at an advertisers price
description: Its OK. Kind of a time waster. The adds are unforgivable. While I am working in monday, every time I click on a hyperlink to go somewhere else, I get a popup link.
author: Ryan N.
pros: I can access it anywhere
cons: cumbersome. TOO MANY ADDS. I now get random popups trying to sell me things constantly
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with Monday has been fantastic. I currently use it with my employer, but when I open my childcare center next year, I’m eager to use it for my own business as well!
author: Destiny M.
pros: Monday offers a high degree of customization. Not only can you add new tabs to your main page, but you can also make this change to your employees’ Monday accounts. Employees!
cons: Initially, I found it too complex, but after working with Monday more frequently, I realized it’s surprisingly user-friendly, especially considering its high degree of customization.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Product is decent, the AI is nice but not intuitive to use. would like to be able to talk to someone live that can walk through some of these processes.
author: Nick T.
pros: The prebuilt templates are very useful. Some of the connections and AI work well but can be tough to navigate
cons: Customer service and helpfulness to walk me through some process and setting up reporting and other. Also your AI customer service bot would no send me to a person when i asked even though it could not answer my questions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Monday.com has been the easiest application I have used at any job and I am hoping to use it for many year to come!
author: Diana H.
pros: I love how I am able to access Monday.com anywhere in the world at any time. I can be remote or in the office to get the job done. It is a perfect tool for any project manager.
cons: The only con can be when they are servicing the application. But they do try to bring it back up right away.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Heightened work productivity..
author: Haley P.
pros: ease of use and navigation, nicely organize platform appearance..
cons: can be overwhelming with how many features it has to offer.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: When set up correctly it is a nice data management tool. I have worked for companies that really struggle with this application. This current company have a nice built Monday.
author: Maggie C.
pros: I like the searchability and the look. It would be nice if the automations would not break for no reason.
cons: Automation breaking too easily. Mine is the only one broken and I have no way to fix it. Other than that it works sufficiently.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: My overall thoughts on Monday service is that it’s a great place to be productive and get work done. It’s easy to use and I really enjoy it
author: Anthony G.
pros: What I love most about this service is the E that it is to use it. It’s a great platform to work together and accomplish work.
cons: But I don’t like about Monday service is there sometimes glitching and a pause as it uploads and reboot the information sometimes that’s a little frustrating
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Couldn't be more impressed! Still learning the in's and out's as I'm new to this, but I already know that it's making my business life easier, and more efficient. Organization is very important to me and monday.com is providing that for me and the team I work with.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Monday.com has been tremendous help with keeping our prospecting organized. It's also beneficial to us for its ability to share information between each other without having to send multiple emails, texts, or make a million calls to confirm information that we can see on monday.com
cons: Being as this is my first time using a system like this, there's nothing I can call a con because I've felt like this is a very efficient tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Monday.com redefined and streamlined our organizational task management.
description: Monday.com is an excellent management tool that redefines the modern business operations of organizations. It has helped us remove all bottlenecks associated with task output by our staff and now we are achieving over 90% routine task completion
author: Maxwell Kwadwo F.
pros: Monday.com's rule-based task automation and its modern UI which makes it easy to customize the dashboard interface, convinced us to choose it.
cons: Although we have received a non-profit discount that gives us 10 free licenses, adding more team members to it seems to be pricy.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Easy to use project management solution
description: My overall experience with Monday has been great. I have seen a lot of value in it as a project management solution, especially as I was frustrated with many others that I tried. Monday simplifies project management and helps you keep track of pending tasks and deadlines. It's definitely worth a try if you need help with keeping track of your work.
author: Amber L.
pros: Monday is has an intuitive interface and is easy to use, even for people who are unfamiliar with traditional project management tools. You can create categories of tasks or projects, which can be color coded as well. It also visualizes your data so you can see how many tasks in a specific time frame you have completed already.
cons: The filtered views are easy to miss at first. I had a little difficulty figuring out why my filters weren't saving, and it was because I wasn't selecting the filtered tab at the top. The archive is also difficult to locate from the main interface, you have to go into another menu to find it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with Monday service has been great. It has been helping me keep things in order. I would just like to be able to send myself reminders on when to contact and update people without having to subscribe to a plan.
author: Arlene L.
pros: I really like how Monday service puts everything in order for me making it easy to find and scroll through things when I’m looking for something.
cons: I don’t like how we have to be subscribed to a plan in order to set up a reminder. I wish that there was an option to set up a two week reminder.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Alan W.
pros: I really appreciated how intuitive and customizable the platform is. The visual dashboards, automation options, and ease of collaboration made task tracking and team communication much more efficient. The flexibility to build workflows that match our specific processes is a huge advantage.
cons: While monday.com is very powerful, I found that some of the more advanced features (like automation or custom formulas) had a learning curve and required more time to fully understand and implement.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Effective tracking tool for recruiters and managers
description: Use for recruiting, tracking applicant flow, and productivity, communication about applicant status, creating new boards for tracking activity
author: Christi G.
pros: Great tool for collaborating on projects with my team and across business units. Helps with efficiency and communication.
cons: Nothing I can not right now! I appreciate the flexibility to set up different boards for various projects and teams.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Customer service and easy to use
description: Overall, my experience with Monday.com has been great. It’s user-friendly, customizable, and the support team is responsive and helpful."
author: Mouayad S.
pros: Monday.com is very easy to use, packed with helpful features, and has outstanding customer support..
cons: Well, The interface can feel overwhelming at first, and some advanced features require a learning curve.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Francisco J.
pros: Easy to use and clear categories. Allows me a clear view of what I have pending. I use the notes feature mostly to ensue I am up to date on my work.
cons: Nothing, I think it works great. if I could improve anything I would implement reminder emails or notifications for follow ups.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great! Time saving! Keeps my brain organized! Sends me helpful reminders! Could not imagine doing HR without it!
author: Bethany R.
pros: I love the automations and I get excited every time I see them running. I think the program is relatively easy to learn.
cons: The program has so many features that it can be a little overwhelming, but that is not exactly a bad thing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with it has been good. It is easy to use and has cut down on the screening process time.
author: Krista C.
pros: I like how user friendly the platform is. With very little training I was able to easily navigate through the site and get everything I needed.
cons: The only thing I don't like is that I don't get notifications to my e-mail if somebody comments on a potential candidate, but that could be user error.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I believe Monday has been a great asset to our company, it has boosted the progression for the IT team and allows upper management to view our progress more effectively
author: Macaulley C.
pros: The ability to project manage has been a great help for the IT team within our company.
cons: Sorting through projects seems a bit clunky when you are attempting to find things.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Easy to use, real-time collaboration management tool
description: Overall it is a great, almost a lifesaver tool, to manage tasks, and teams almost for any project that I have been working on :)
author: George E.
pros: It's so natural to use and smooth to manage for myself and my remote team. I can generate everything from vendors certificate to devising customer project boards for multiple areas. There are plenty of excellent functions we use daily, containing pursuing, substitute-article tasks, CRM, board sharing, project figures, electronic mail notifications, and more
cons: The are some critical features missing in a mobile app, such as checklists and forms submission. Hopefully will be fixed soon. However, the rest is great, can't complain!
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: The experience with monday.com as positive and efficient
author: Haythum D.
pros: The platform promotes effective collaboration by allowing team members to share and access real-time updates.Integration capabilitiesThe platform has a visually appealing
cons: The pricing of Monday.com can be perceived as expensive
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Charles C.
pros: The UI design is visually pleasing and makes the program easy to use. The software can be easily customized for different types of projects. Time tracking is great and helps us account for time spent on any given project. Monday.com can be easily integrated with popular apps I use such as trello and slack. I also love the quick and helpful customer support from the team.
cons: It's really difficult finding any fault with this software. The one single issue I can think of it that the interface seems to wide, such that you have to do a lot to scrolling to see everything, especially for small screens.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: A great collaborative tool for working on projects.
author: Russell C.
pros: With Monday.com there was no guesswork as to who was working on what, and where their progress was. Each person was able to see each ticket and follow its progress.
cons: Sometimes things could get muddled or lost if a representative tagged a task with the wrong info.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall it is absolutely amazing product that helps us a lot in carrying out various activities and staying organized.
author: Christopher R.
pros: There are so many pros of this but a few of them I am going to mention here. One of the pros is that this software is extremely helpful in assigning tasks to the individual group member and sharing ideas with others. It helps us a lot in achieving our goals within short time. I like its ease of use and its attractive layout. It has simplified our work. I surely recommend this product to other prospective customers as it provides powerful and effective solutions for Project management.
cons: I could not find any negative aspect of this software. It works so nicely. Moreover, I never come across any problem while using this product. I feel comfortable to use this.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
